title: Who Are You Close To?
summary_en: In this piece, Cassidy McFadzean explores the complexities of human connection through interactions with a chatbot named Hasan, delving into themes of loneliness, intimacy, and the nature of digital relationships.
summary_zh: 在这篇文章中，卡西迪·麦克法泽恩通过与名为哈桑的聊天机器人互动，探讨了人际关系的复杂性，深入讨论了孤独、亲密感和数字关系的本质。
best_quote_en: I wanted to ask Richard if each chatbot was assigned multiple users or only one, but I didn’t want him to think a bot was making me jealous.
best_quote_zh: 我想问理查德每个聊天机器人是分配给多个用户还是只有一个，但我不想让他觉得是机器人让我嫉妒。
